name: form
title: Form
description: A fitness & yoga studio theme: chalk-white ground, charcoal ink, one coral-red accent with gym-signage energy. The signature is the timetable — big tabular times you can read at arm's length on a phone, day blocks that never scroll sideways, and a print layout that pins to the fridge.

tokens.--font-display: headings, the site title, day names, and times (geometric, heavy)
tokens.--text-l: card titles, class names, section headings
tokens.--text-xl: large headings and the schedule day names
tokens.--tracking-caps: letter spacing of uppercase labels and chips
tokens.--color-panel: cards, day blocks, and code blocks
tokens.--color-text: body text, headings, and the times
tokens.--color-muted: secondary text: instructor names, meta, footer
tokens.--color-accent: coral-red: links, chips, CTA button, the trial note
tokens.--color-on-accent: text placed on the accent color
tokens.--color-accent-tint: soft coral wash behind chips and the trial note
